calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Establish Fact, Time, and Place of Birth.

Petitioner Karena Apple Feng initially appeared via Zoom during roll call but was no longer present when the matter was called for hearing. The matter was called and passed twice during the calendar. At the conclusion of the calendar, the matter was called a third time, and petitioner again failed to appear.

The court ordered the matter off calendar due to non-appearance.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
